description: Bottom of a legal document. Location: Fustat. Dating; Unknown. Involves Moshe b. Aharon ha-Kohen, his brother Shemuel, their sister Sarah, and shares in a house. It seems that Moshe ends up with 1/3 of the house and Sarah with 1/6 of the house. Signed by Yeshuʿa b. Shemarya and Avraham b. [...]. The validation (qiyyum) is signed by Yehuda b. Moshe and Peraḥya b. Sahlān.
description_he: תחתית מסמך משפטי; פוסטאט; עוסק במשה בן אהרון הכהן, אחיו שמואל, אחותם שרה וחלקים בבית; משה מקבל 1/3, שרה 1/6
